calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeh MacDonald, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DCFS Trust.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Alicia D. Atienza
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 5 dismissed.
Court admitted into evidence Declaration filed on August 29, 2012 in support of Default Judgment. After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $36,461.63
Pre-Judgment Interest: Waived.
Attorney's Fees: Waived
Costs: $559.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,020.63
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Jan-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Sep-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/04/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Continued To Apr-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
